markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline issues and review January performance.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Form Snippets Paused:** Due to a slow preview bug and the upcoming Strapi V5 migration, all form snippets will be removed from new pages.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Airtable Pipeline Live:** A new Airtable view provides real-time visibility into the content pipeline; a Strapi webhook will automate status updates to eliminate manual tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**January Performance Surged:** Traffic hit an all-time high (+25% MoM), driven by a 40% jump in impressions and a 400% increase in newsletter signups.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**Review Process Accelerated:** To increase publishing velocity, reviews for integration and comparison pages will be minimal, with minor fixes handled post-publication.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Process

  - [**Problem:** Usman reported issues with form snippet previews and content refresh visibility, which were blocking the publication of new integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [**Solution → Pause Form Snippets:**](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The preview bug is low-priority due to the upcoming Strapi V5 migration and site rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [**Action:** All form snippets will be removed from new pages. Usman will also remove them from the four pages already staged.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Solution → New Airtable Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [Carrie created a new Airtable view for real-time visibility into the content pipeline, replacing scattered tracking methods.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [**Automation:** A Strapi webhook will automate status updates (e.g., "Published") in Airtable, eliminating manual tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**Solution → Accelerated Reviews:**](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
      - [To increase publishing velocity, reviews for integration and comparison pages will be minimal.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
      - [**Process:** Publish quickly → Fix minor issues later.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)

### January Performance Review

  - [**Overall:** Strong growth, with traffic hitting an all-time high.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**Key Metrics (MoM):**](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [**Traffic:** +25%](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [**Impressions:** +40%](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**Engagement Rate:** Scaled well with traffic (47% → 40%).](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Newsletter Signups:** +400%](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Conversion Signals:**](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [**Contact Sales Clicks:** \>5,000](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [**Demo Form Submissions:** Sharp drop confirmed as an infrastructure issue, not a content problem.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [**Top Performers:** "Markdown editors for React," "best CSS frameworks," "React markdown guide," "NextJS 16 features."](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - **Declining Performers:** "BUN vs. Node.js" (monitor), "JS frameworks" (still \#1 overall).
  - [**Content Contribution:** The content library now drives 53% of all organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### Future Reporting Needs

  - [**Request:** Victor requested performance tracking for specific content types (integrations, refreshed articles) to validate strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [**Action:** Carrie will add a "refreshes" cohort to the Looker dashboard and analyze integration page performance for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
      - [Inform Usman to remove form snippets from new and staged pages.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
      - [Configure the Strapi webhook to automate Airtable status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [Add a "refreshes" cohort to the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [Analyze integration page performance for the next sync.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [**Theo:**](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
      - [Review Usman's proposed topics (Next.js templates, etc.) and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Adopt the accelerated review process for integration and comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/JvzpXJfk7v5ZMz2xKWZ3743qfEQVs8SK?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
